reviews.comment:
Soy socio. A las 12:00 horas de hoy día (28/02/22) quise cargar combustible y solo podía hacerlo en efectivo ya que no funcionaba sistema. O sea no podía pagar ni con tarjeta, ni con aplicación YPF.
Les dije que me cobrarán en efectivo pero que me hicieran descuento como socio. Tampoco podían hacerlo
UNA VERGÜENZA.
En principio deberían tener un  sistema de respaldo .
No es tampoco tan difícil, cobrar en efectivo y hacer el descuento correspondiente

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member. At 12:00 PM today (February 28, 2022), I wanted to fill up my tank, but I could only pay in cash because the system wasn't working. I couldn't pay by card or the YPF app.
I told them to charge me in cash but give me the member discount. They couldn't do that either.
A disgrace.
They should definitely have a backup system. It's not that difficult to accept cash and apply the corresponding discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcnNIRGRBEAE
